body:
Use this issue to track Sepo setup for this repository.

The latest setup status is maintained in the comment below.

comments.body:
<!-- sepo-agent-onboarding-check -->
## Sepo setup status

### Current status

- [x] GitHub App/auth: resolved via `oidc_broker`
- [ ] Model credentials: not configured
  - Add `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN`, or `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in [repository Actions secrets](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/settings/secrets/actions).
  - Optional: configure `AGENT_DEFAULT_PROVIDER`.
- [ ] Memory: not initialized
  - Run **[Actions > Agent / Memory / Initialization](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/actions/workflows/agent-memory-bootstrap.yml)**.
- [ ] Rubrics: not initialized
  - Optional: run **[Actions > Agent / Rubrics / Initialization](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/actions/workflows/agent-rubrics-initialization.yml)**.

### Remaining setup

- [ ] Configure one model provider credential in [repository Actions secrets](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/settings/secrets/actions).
- [ ] Run [Agent / Memory / Initialization](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/actions/workflows/agent-memory-bootstrap.yml) to initialize memory branch `agent/memory`.
- [ ] Optional: run [Agent / Rubrics / Initialization](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/actions/workflows/agent-rubrics-initialization.yml) to initialize rubrics branch `agent/rubrics`.

### Test Sepo

After setup, try:

```md
@sepo-agent /answer Is Sepo configured correctly in this repository?
```

Try implementation:

```md
@sepo-agent /implement Create a small README update that verifies the agent can open a PR.
```

On an open pull request:

```md
@sepo-agent /review
```

Last checked: [GitHub Actions run](https://github.com/lean-workspace/sphere-packing-lean/actions/runs/29230329900)

title: Sepo setup check
